zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Kirby於1390年出生在英國肯特霍頓 科比時，她的父親John Kirby of Horton Kirby20歲，母親Lora de Ros19歲。她於1415年11月之前與Thomas Stonor結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年10月1日在英國奧可福爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Kirby于1390年出生在英国肯特霍頓 科比时，她的父亲John Kirby of Horton Kirby20岁，母亲Lora de Ros19岁。她于1415年11月之前与Thomas Stonor结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年10月1日在英国奧可福爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

variants.name: Kerwick
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Garmhaic, more commonly Anglicized as Kirby .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Kirby was born in 1390, in Horton Kirby, Kent, England, her father, John Kirby of Horton Kirby, was 20 and her mother, Lora de Ros, was 19. She married Thomas Stonor before November 1415. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 1 October 1468, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Kirby est née en 1390, à Horton Kirby, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Kirby of Horton Kirby, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lora de Ros, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Stonor avant novembre 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 octobre 1468, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Kirby 1390 in Horton Kirby, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Kirby of Horton Kirby 20 und ihre Mutter Lora de Ros 19. Sie hat vor November 1415 Thomas Stonor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Oktober 1468 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Kirby è nata il nel 1390 nel Horton Kirby, Kent, England, sua padre, John Kirby of Horton Kirby, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Lora de Ros, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Stonor prima del novembre 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 ottobre 1468, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Kirbyが1390年にイギリスケントホールトン キルビーで生まれた時，父John Kirby of Horton Kirbyは20歳，母Lora de Rosは19歳であった。1415年11月以前にThomas Stonorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年10月1日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Kirby(이)가 1390년 영국 켄트 호르턴 커비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Kirby of Horton Kirby(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lora de Ros(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1415년 11월 이전 Thomas Stonor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 10월 1일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.of Atherstone, Warwickshire, England: Atherstone, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Kirby nasceu em 1390, em Horton Kirby, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Kirby of Horton Kirby, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lora de Ros, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Stonor antes novembro de 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1468, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Kirby родилась в 1390 г. в местности хауртон кирби, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Kirby of Horton Kirby было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lora de Ros, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Stonor перед ноябрь 1415 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 октября 1468 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Kirby nació en 1390, en Horton Kirby, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Kirby of Horton Kirby, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lora de Ros, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Stonor antes de noviembre de 1415. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de octubre de 1468, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
